hooks.command: f=$(jq -r "(.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path) // empty"); b=$(basename "$f"); case "$b" in .env.template) ;; .env|.env.*) printf "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"permissionDecision\":\"deny\",\"permissionDecisionReason\":\"Access to %s is blocked: it may contain Portainer credentials/API keys. Use .env.template instead.\"}}" "$b" ;; esac
